concepts.finding: Extends node2vec to dynamic graphs with evolving edges. Efficiently updates embeddings as new edges arrive without recomputing from scratch. Uses a change-detection mechanism to identify affected nodes and only updates their embeddings. Edge appearance and disappearance both handled.
concepts.implication: Incremental update of keyword embeddings as new co-occurrences arrive (e.g., daily search log updates). Only keywords whose co-occurrence patterns change significantly need embedding updates.
concepts.open_question: What threshold of co-occurrence change warrants a keyword embedding update? Can embeddings be updated per-batch or per-keyword?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Incremental keyword embedding updates (dynnode2vec) achieve similar cluster quality to batch retraining with 10-100x less computation per update cycle.
